## Welcome to La maison VEDA Sri-Lanka

Nestled between jungle and lake, on the shores of Koggala Lake in the south of Sri Lanka, La Maison VEDA is a well-being place dedicated to yoga, nature and authentic experiences.

We welcome yoga and well-being retreats, organized in small groups, for those who wish to slow down, reconnect and deepen their practice in an inspiring natural setting.

La Maison VEDA is also open to travelers seeking conscious holidays, looking for a peaceful stay close to nature, where life flows gently and hospitality is sincere.

Finally, we collaborate with travel agencies and retreat organizers, offering tailor-made experiences and personalized well-being stays, designed for small groups and a more human and responsible approach to tourism.

Two villas with authentic charm, a yoga shala with breathtaking views over the lake, and a vegetarian cuisine inspired by Sri Lankan and Ayurvedic traditions make La Maison VEDA a true house of experiences.

### For small Groups, Retreats & Agencies

With its two authentic villas and a rooftop yoga shala, La Maison VEDA is the perfect setting for a peaceful holiday, a transformative retreat, or a bespoke group experience.

We host up to 7 guests on-site, and can extend to 15 guests with nearby villas.

Whether you come to rest, to gather, or to guide a retreat, La Maison VEDA is ready to welcome you — including travel agencies and retreat organizers seeking tailor-made well-being programs.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201709%202560'%2F%3E)

## Our offer

### The Lake house

Nestled just 2 meters from the tranquil waters of Koggala Lake, this authentic earth-walled house offers a true retreat into nature.

**2 connecting bedrooms:**

• Master with queen-size bed (160 cm) & en-suite bathroom

• Connected bedroom with 2 single bed & ample storage

Fully equipped kitchen

Spacious terrace with hammock

Step outside to a hammock strung between two palm trees, perfect for quiet mornings or evening relaxation. From the garden, watch local fishermen cast their nets at sunrise. A timeless glimpse into Sri Lanka’s soul!

🛏 **Total:** 2 beds

Perched higher on the property, the **Lake Loft** combines modern comfort with panoramic lake views. Recently renovated, it features air conditioning, a spacious open-plan kitchen, and a large terrace with lounge seating.

Inside, the space is divided into **3 separate areas using light linen curtains**, offering flexible privacy. Sleeping arrangements include:

- **1 romantic queen-size four-poster bed (160×200 cm)**

- **2 single beds**

- **1 sigle bed**


The Lake Loft is perfect for families or retreat groups. Its serene design and panoramic views invite rest, connection, and harmony with nature.

🛏 **Total:** 4 beds

### The Yoga Shala

A short walk up a dedicated staircase brings you to our **rooftop yoga shala**, a light-filled sanctuary with **uninterrupted views of Koggala Lake, lush palms, and vibrant wildlife**.

The **80 m² open-air studio** comfortably hosts **15–20 participants**, making it perfect for yoga, breathwork, and spiritual gatherings.

Fully equipped with **15 yoga mats** in a **storage cabinet**, and its own **bathroom and toilet**, the space offers everything you need to create a transformative experience surrounded by the beauty of the Sri Lankan jungle.

## AGENCIES

### Tailor-Made Well-being Programs!

La Maison VEDA is a small, authentic well-being house located on the shores of Koggala Lake, in the south of Sri Lanka. We welcome small groups in a peaceful natural setting, offering a unique blend of yoga, nature, and local culture.

What we offer for travel agencies and retreat organizers

We collaborate with travel agencies, retreat leaders, and tour operators to create tailor-made well-being programs for their clients. Our approach is flexible, authentic, and designed for small groups, with a focus on meaningful experiences and responsible tourism.

Accommodation & capacity

- Up to 7 guests on-site (two villas, 7 beds)
- Possibility to extend up to 15 guests with nearby villas
- Full property privatization for groups
- Minimum stay: 3 nights

Included in every stay

Every program includes daily yoga and meditation sessions, with the option to add more activities and experiences à la carte.

Experiences à la carte

We offer a range of well-being and cultural experiences that can be selected according to the length and purpose of the stay, including:

- Yoga classes (Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin)
- Pilate with PURA Ahangama teachers
- Sound baths (crystal bowls, Tibetan bowls, gong bath, multi-instrument)
- Breathwork sessions (certified professional)
- Cacao ceremony
- Kirtan (chanting circle with musicians)
- Cooking workshops (Sri Lankan and Ayurvedic)
- Full-day traditional Ayurvedic house experience (off-site)
- Temple visit & Puja ritual with a local Buddhist guide

- Boat ride on Koggala Lake
- Tea factory visit
- Galle Fort visit (UNESCO World Heritage)
- Turtle hatchery visit & baby turtle release

How it works

Agencies can choose a package (3–7 days) and add experiences à la carte. We will provide a customized program and pricing based on the group size, dates, and preferences.

## Our Story

La Maison VEDA was born from a journey of transformation — a return to essence, and a calling to live in harmony with body, mind, and soul.

I grew up in the heart of the Cognac region, surrounded by the beauty of the French countryside. On the outside, my life seemed successful: studies in Bordeaux and a decade in the pharmaceutical industry. Inside, I felt disconnected, just another number in a world where humanity seemed to fade. The stress drained my nervous system and affected my health, especially my digestion.

Determined to take my life back, I traveled to India to study Ayurveda. Everything began to shift. I learned to listen to my body, nourish it, and heal it. Discovering my gluten intolerance was only the beginning — the real transformation came from reconnecting with my breath, my soul, and my inner truth. Through Kundalini awakening practices, I tapped into a deeper energy, unlocking clarity, balance, and a profound sense of purpose.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201000%201480'%2F%3E)

## What to do around La maison VEDA

Discover the best of Sri Lanka’s southern coast right from your stay in Habaraduwa. Whether you’re seeking a peaceful retreat or thrilling new adventures, there’s so much to explore nearby.

Catch the sunrise on a morning surf session or learn to ride your first wave at one of the stunning beaches just minutes away. Head to **Mirissa** for unforgettable dolphin and whale watching, or explore the lively shores of **Unawatuna** with its beach cafés and snorkeling spots.

Take a cultural journey to the serene **Japanese Peace Pagoda**, tour a traditional **tea factory**, or visit a local **sea turtle sanctuary** to learn about conservation efforts. For a deeper connection to the land, wander through lush paddy fields or join a guided day trip to discover hidden gems along the south coast.

From relaxation to adventure, your journey begins here in Habaraduwa.

Some info has been automatically translated.Show original

The VEDA house brings together two villas 5 minutes from the beaches of Habaraduwa, nestled in a lush garden overlooking Lake Koggala. We live in harmony with nature: curious monkeys, eagles hovering over the water, fishermen at dawn. Calm and serenity reign here, with a large yoga studio and 7 beds that can accommodate up to 9 people.

The space

The VEDA house brings together two villas nestled in a garden facing Lake Koggala, 5 minutes from the beaches of Habaraduwa.

The modern and air-conditioned Lake Loft offers a double bed, a single bed and a large corner sofa convertible into two single beds, ideal for a couple + child, with two extra beds in the living room. Large terrace, bathroom on the ground floor and, above, a spacious yoga studio with lake views and shower room.

The Petite Maison du Lac, a traditional lakeside house, includes two connecting bedrooms (one double bed and two single beds), a bathroom, a fully equipped kitchen, and a large terrace. It is not air-conditioned

In all: 7 beds, up to 9 people. Calm, nature and rejuvenation.

### Jess

12 years on Airbnb

[![Jess](https://a0.muscache.com/im/pictures/user/ece0c000-9d2d-4c92-a437-dc653ae40256.jpg?im_w=240)](https://www.airbnb.com/users/profile/1478986773585433703)

Rating, 5 stars

,  ·

October 2025

,  ·

Stayed a few nights

We booked the Veda house with my friends, and it was just wonderful. We had the entire property all to ourselves , two villas by the lake, absolutely amazing. The housekeeper, Lakshman, was adorable; he did everything to make us feel at home. And Aurélie came to make breakfast during our stay , the vegan pancake and the homemade pineapple jam were so good!

There were three beds in the smaller house, perfect for a couple and two children. In the larger apartment, it’s all open, there were two beds plus two more in the living room, you can pull the curtains for a bit of privacy. The apartment itself is beautiful, and the kitchen is so well equipped, I love cooking, so that was a real bonus!

And if you enjoy yoga, the yoga studio is stunning. Maybe just one small thing, it rained a lot the first day and since they were planting grass, the courtyard was a bit muddy. But apart from that, nothing to complain about.

One of our best stays in Sri Lanka! Love it so much such heaven!

Show more

### Anais

4 years on Airbnb

[![Anais](https://a0.muscache.com/im/pictures/user/d4dfa1bf-f4be-4fc1-bb59-3f31dc66996c.jpg?im_w=240)](https://www.airbnb.com/users/profile/1486808981521013381)

Rating, 5 stars

,  ·

November 2025

,  ·

Stayed a few nights

Absolutely wonderful stay at La Maison VEDA.

We were two families and had rented both villas on the property: the small house by the lake and the more modern villa a little higher up.

The small villa, with its two bedrooms, bathroom with hot water! and its beautiful terrace overlooking the lake, was perfect for us and our children. It was a real pleasure to wake up every morning to this beautiful view... It felt like we were in the middle of the jungle!

The upstairs house is very spacious and open, with a large terrace and even a large yoga studio on the roof where I was able to do my daily practice. The entire property is superb, peaceful and exotic.

We really enjoyed being able to cook on site, chat with neighbors and discover local life around the lake.

A huge thank you to our host, who was very kind, always available and very responsive to answer our questions.

## Welcome To The Jungle Villa

Someone was about to turn this stunning piece of nature into  duo-crop land to farm coconuts and cinnamon.

We couldn’t let that happen: We bought the land to save it, with little plan past saving the trees…

The more time we spent at the land, step by step, the vision for the Jungle Villa arrived. It needed to be respected and shared.

We built the Jungle Villa without chopping down a single established tree, you’ll even see our boundary wall manouvering itself around the trees.

It’s a special space that we know you’ll feel.

![Yoga Retreat Venue in Ahangama: DJI 20240602162749 0008 D scaled e1731476143984](https://jungle-villa.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/DJI_20240602162749_0008_D-scaled-e1731476143984.jpg)

![Yoga Retreat Venue in Ahangama: 20250218 192142 scaled](https://jungle-villa.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/20250218_192142-scaled.jpg)

## About The Jungle Villa

Tucked away just a few kilometers from the shore, our villa offers a serene escape that truly nurtures tranquility.

This stunning 8-bedroom retreat villa, sleeping 17 people, is situated on nearly 2 acres of lush tropical jungle, providing breathtaking views of the tree canopy.

Settle into the enchanting atmosphere and natural beauty, while we make life easy for you.

Our caring full-time housekeeper, and 24/7 security guard will make sure you feel safe and carefree.

Enjoy the luxury of a private chef, easy scooter rentals, and personalized yoga sessions in our secluded shala for a truly tailored escape. We are here to help with any services.

## Calm, Luxurious, Jungle Environment

![Yoga Retreat Venue in Ahangama: Lanka Yoga 2023 Dean Raphael WR 486 1 e1731056174118](https://jungle-villa.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Lanka-Yoga-2023-Dean-Raphael-WR-486-1-e1731056174118.jpg)Beautiful Jungle

![Yoga Retreat Venue in Ahangama: Copy of jungle villa 180224 capturedbyjk 13 scaled e1731346709858](https://jungle-villa.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Copy-of-jungle-villa-180224-capturedbyjk-13-scaled-e1731346709858.jpg)Fully Private Use

![Yoga Retreat Venue in Ahangama: JV housekeeper scaled e1731055436174](https://jungle-villa.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/JV-housekeeper-scaled-e1731055436174.jpg)Friendly Staff

## Everything To Make Your Stay Memorable

## Firepit + BBQ Space

Embrace the stars and the jungle in The perfect setting for relaxing evenings, doubles as a perfect place for a BBQ.

## Full Time Housekeeper

Relax into your holiday, knowing the villa will stay perfectly clean, thanks to our amazing housekeeper and cleaner

## Family Friendly

Warm weather, gorgeous oceans and spectacular outdoor adventures means that there are entertaining activities for travellers of every age

## 24/7 Security

Feel safe and secure at the villa at all times with our team of security guards are protecting you

## Yoga Shala

A private yoga shala, nestled on the edge of the jungle, for seasoned yogi's and beginners alike

## Outdoor Dining

A stunning setting, with fairy lights strung above, creating a gorgeous setting for connecting

## Surfers Paradise

Embrace the sea and learn a new skill, surfing in some of the warmest waters, on super consistent waves

## Transfer Services

Begin your holiday with the peace of mind that comes with knowing that all of your airport transfers and transport can be taken care of
